data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the maximum capacity of 12 people for the tour. However, the evidence indicates that only 2 bookings were confirmed, which does not meet the requirement of having a maximum capacity of 12. This clearly demonstrates a gap in the requirement coverage as the condition for maximum capacity is not satisfied.
gaps: Maximum capacity (12 people) not satisfied; only 2 bookings confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
